boundary_definition: Layer 0 final query token attention result after applying post-softmax real-key probabilities to V and summing over real key positions, before attention output projection, residual, MLP, logits, or later layers.
layout_interpretation: flattened post-head-concatenation vector before attn.out/o_proj; equivalent to [query_head, head_dim] head-major flattened

sink_participation_semantics.definition: Official sdpa concatenates sink logits before softmax, then drops the sink probability with W[..., :-1] before the V einsum. The sink affects normalization but has no V vector.

source_v_tensor_boundary.name: official attn.qkv(normed) V slice reshaped before weighted sum
source_v_tensor_boundary.definition: v = qkv[:, q_dim + kv_dim : q_dim + 2 * kv_dim].contiguous(); v.view(tokens, num_kv_heads, head_dim)

v_tensor_metadata.layout: [token, kv_head, head_dim], expanded to [token, kv_head, heads_per_kv, head_dim]

gqa_mapping.replication: Official sdpa expands V with V[:, :, None, :].expand(-1, -1, heads_per_kv, -1); GQA sharing happens by broadcast during the weighted-sum einsum.

next_bounded_step: Runtime-forward can compare its final-token layer-0 weighted V sum before output projection against this official boundary; do not broaden to o_proj, residual, MLP, logits, or later layers yet.
